---
title: "Walter Fisher"
---

## Walter Fisher

**Dates:** (b.Clevedon, Somerset 1842/3)-1881-Otterbourne)

### Description

elementary schoolmaster in Otterbourne in the 1881 census

### Letters

- Letter from July 2, 1881.
- Letter from March 29th [1880]
- Letter from March 14th 1879
- Letter from Sept 17th 1878
- Letter from June 17th 1878

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
